summary: Comprehensive mobile app conversion testing for VenuLoQ iPhone experience. All 17 test cases passed. Bottom tab bar correctly shows on all customer pages with proper navigation, hides on venue detail pages. Mobile header is compact (48px), footer hidden on mobile. Sticky CTA positioned at bottom-0 on venue detail. Chat button positioned above tab bar. All sections correctly hidden/shown based on viewport.

bottom_tab_bar_visibility.detail: Tab bar visible on Home, Explore/Search, Saved/Favorites, Requests/My-Enquiries, Profile pages

bottom_tab_bar_5_tabs.detail: All 5 tabs present: Home, Explore, Saved, Requests, Profile with correct icons (Home, Search, Heart, FileText, User)

tab_active_highlight.detail: Active tab correctly highlighted gold (#D4B36A) on each respective page

tab_navigation.detail: Home→/, Explore→/venues/search, Saved→/favorites, Requests→/my-enquiries, Profile→/profile all working

tab_bar_hidden_venue_detail.detail: Tab bar correctly hidden on venue detail pages (e.g., /venues/mumbai/taj-mahal-palace-mumbai)

tab_bar_desktop_hidden.detail: Tab bar hidden on desktop (lg breakpoint) via lg:hidden class

footer_mobile_hidden.detail: Footer hidden on mobile via hidden md:block class

mobile_header_compact.detail: Mobile header height is 48px (h-12) with safe area padding

landing_sections_hidden_mobile.detail: Stats, Testimonials, Why VenuLoQ sections hidden on mobile, visible on desktop

venue_detail_no_breadcrumb_mobile.detail: Breadcrumb hidden on mobile venue detail, visible on desktop

venue_detail_back_arrow.detail: Native back arrow button present on venue detail page

sticky_cta_bottom_0.detail: Sticky mobile CTA positioned at bottom-0 (edge at 844px on 844px viewport)

chat_button_above_tab_bar.detail: Chat button positioned above tab bar (772px vs tab bar at 788px)

content_not_hidden_behind_tab_bar.detail: Customer dashboard and search page content has proper bottom padding via app-main-content class

booking_flow.detail: Venue search → venue detail → Start Planning button flow works correctly

backend_apis.detail: GET /api/venues/featured returns 200 with 8 venues, GET /api/venues?limit=5 returns 200 with 5 venues

critical_code_review_comments: BottomTabBar.js correctly implements lg:hidden for desktop hiding
Tab bar uses proper data-testid attributes for all 5 tabs
CustomerOnlyUI in App.js correctly hides tab bar on venue detail pages using regex pattern
StickyMobileCTA.js positioned at bottom-0 with safe-area-inset-bottom padding
ChatBot.js positioned above tab bar using calc(4.5rem + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))
index.css app-main-content class provides proper bottom padding for tab bar clearance
Footer.js uses hidden md:block to hide on mobile
LandingPage.js mobile header uses h-12 (48px) with safe-area-inset-top padding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile app conversion fully tested. Bottom tab bar with 5 tabs (Home, Explore, Saved, Requests, Profile) works correctly on all customer pages. Tab bar hides on venue detail pages where sticky CTA is shown. Mobile header is compact 48px. Footer hidden on mobile. Chat button positioned above tab bar. All landing page sections correctly hidden/shown based on viewport. Login flow via /auth page works. Backend APIs responding correctly.
